name_en: 【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from grey leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Grey leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
name_cn:
【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from grey leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Grey leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
Model: 428726.
Open dimensions: 21(W) x 9cm(H)
Closed dimensions: 11(W) x 9cm(H)
Color: Grey hardware/Full leather
